author: Disney Channel YouTube
text:
Lizzie Meets (and Kisses) Aaron Carter ☺️💕 | Lizzie McGuire | @disneychannel
Watch a clip from Lizzie McGuire season 1 episode 7, "Here Comes Aaron Carter". With Matt's help, Lizzie, Miranda and Gordo sneak onto the set of singer Aaron Carter's latest video shoot.

Watch the next Lizzie McGuire throwback video here: https://youtu.be/-aEEwMjdTpQ

Available on Disney+
https://www.disneyplus.com/whats-on/entity-a5525471-bb5a-4367-b7a3-52a69dbfbad8

Watch more Lizzie McGuire videos here: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLg6R6yXKSLYB5LEZ3LS9wy_ob5GCFs9S3

Enter the world of Lizzie McGuire who, together with her best friends Miranda and Gordo, gets into all sorts of misadventures and embarrassing situations as she makes her way through the middle school maze. Every day is a popularity contest, every class is a crisis and on top of everything else, Lizzie has to deal with her annoying little brother Matt, "queen of mean" Kate, and crush Ethan Craft! You always know what Lizzie is thinking, and if she can't quite say it, you can be sure her animated alter ego will.

author: Disney Channel YouTube
text:
Disney Channel Games 2008 Second Full Episode ❤️💛💚💙 | @disneychannel
Watch the Disney Channel Games 2008 second full episode, "Hang Tight". The teams must weave through an obstacle course while linked together. Jonas Brothers perform in the post-games concert. 

Watch the next full episode here: https://youtu.be/xvj-fNOVJbo

Available on Disney+
https://www.disneyplus.com/whats-on

Watch the newest Disney Channel videos here: https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLiv1IUQDVSNKSwiTLE-l6pwhnu75gRIfH&si=PkfaZLbxEPbza9_U
